In a mixing bowl, mix the batter first (cake flour, corn starch, baking powder, and sparkling water). Mix until homogenous.
In a separate mixing bowl, reserve extra cake flour (various amount) to coat shrimp before battering.
Add shrimp to dredge flour in small amounts at a time, to prevent excess moisture mixing.
Each batch of shrimp as it is dredged, batter immediately and start frying.
Fry in single layers at a time, in a fryer set at 350°F, and fry until lightly golden or yellow in colour (breading).
Reserve batches to a sheet tray and cool in single layers.  Cool in blast chiller after each tray is full.
Reserve in hotel pans for service, in the cooler.
